creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
I can easily fix half of this but qt_hack is something the calibre
developers are doing that they should so that's been, appropriately
enough, a bit of a hack to handle. I'll be submitting an updated calibre
soon that addresses the py-cssutils moving it to a run dependency and
will see what I can work out for qt_hack. 

Rusty
